nasb.text: These were the potters and the inhabitants of Netaim and Gederah; they lived there with the king for his work.

esv.text: These were the potters who were inhabitants of Netaim and Gederah. They lived there in the king’s service.

cnv.text: 他們都是陶匠，是尼他應和基低拉的居民；他們與王一起住在那裡，為王作工。

ccb.text: 他们都是住在尼他英和基低拉的陶匠，他们在那里为王效力。
